description_long: This object is a handheld gaming console with a large central display flanked by two detachable controllers, one blue and one red. The screen displays a vibrant landscape scene, suggesting it is powered on and in use. The left controller features a joystick and several buttons, while the right controller has a matching joystick and additional buttons, including the familiar A, B, X, and Y layout. The back of the device is mostly black, with the colored controllers providing a striking contrast. The device is slim and rectangular, designed for portability and ergonomic handheld use. Its construction appears to be primarily plastic with electronic components inside, and it is likely powered by an internal rechargeable battery.
description: A slim, rectangular handheld gaming console with a large screen and detachable blue and red controllers on either side. The device features multiple buttons and joysticks, designed for portable entertainment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with a landscape image and both blue and red controllers with visible buttons and joysticks.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the device and the edge of the red controller.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mostly black back panel with the blue and red controllers visible at the ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thin profile and the edge of the blue controller.
